TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Wi-al-niw-s, title = Wi-al-niw-s, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wi-al-niw-s} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman == Wi-al-niw-sÁ∂≠ÁąĺÁīźśĖĮ Wi-al-niw-s "Li-taw-wan a kamu Vilnius, ('v ≤…™l ≤n ≤ äs) , ayza Li-taw-wan a kanatal angangan a tukay patizeng tu lice. tini i amis balat 54 tu 41 a ben, wali cin 25 tu 17 ben. 2020 a mihcaan hawsa, tiniay a tademaw 580,020 "hamin u Wi-al-niw-s a kuwan u tademaw 810,290". malumayay a niyazu' 1994 a mihcaan pala nu kitakitay a nisubelidan a lalangawan. Wi-al-niw-s u 2009 a mihcaan nu Ow-cow a kahenulan a lalangawan. likisś≠∑ŚŹ≤ i likisiay, Wi-al-niw-s zayhan nau kasa cin-ce atu kawa nu hitay u lalekalan nacaay kalecaday a kanatal. Wi-al-niw-s sa u kasumamadan a tuse nu likisi, migingnkiway tu likisi "Romas BatŇęra" asa nakamuan 1253 a mihcaan Min-taw-cya-s pakalahen tu mala Li-taw-wan a hungti a ci-cen Voruta, uyza Wi-al-niw-s. duduc tu Cye-s-wa-bu.Mi-ow-sen a kamu, "izaw ku mikuwanay tu Li-taw-wan, i zikuz nu piadupan i malikatay a lamal abi', cisepi tu paliayaw. mahulak ku spnpi zikuz, nikabi'an niza nasawni patizeng tu tukay'." Romas BatŇęra Voruta, ." uyni a tukay saayaway i nasulita mapatahkal i 1323 a mihcaan, u situngusay Ke-ti-mi-na-s i ayaw a mihcaan patigami ci Zow-wang al-se-al se milunguc amidiput tu Li-taw-wan acaay kaala ku Tiw-tun-s sapaput, mahukay tu hawsa, 1325 a mihca I a bulan 25 a dimiad muliyaw aca pasayza i Han-sa a kalakadum u angangan patigzamin tu tukayay, pasaicelang tu kakitaan, pasubayuay, misiwbayay, misamukinay taza silala'ay atu malukay kasasumaay a tademaw "Te-kow-atu Yu-tay" tayni mananel i Li-taw-wan, uyza sa i Wi-al-niw-say haymaws satu malahad tahkal tu i pulul nu Yu-tay a kitizaan. 1362 a mihcaan anucaay 1363 a mihcaan Li-tawan nu situngusay ci Al-ci-al-ta-si sumilaway a kangangayawan mademec Cin-cang-han-kow zikuz, palahad tu lala'katukuh I Ci-pu-Po-tow-li-ya atu-U-ke-lan a ulaulangan, namahiza uyaan Ci-pu-low-s nu macakatay-Tong-cen-cyaw, S-la-bu kiwkay a kamu atu ulic nu laylay pacubuden tu i Wi-al-niw-s, tiniay pakutayen tu Ci-pu, i Pow-lan mapulung tu Pow-lan ayaw malilid ku tinsikiw, hiza satu mala anu S-la-bu Tung-cen a singku macakatay a angangan. 1378 a mihcaan Li-taw-wan nu situngusay Kay-la pabeli tu tiniay a tuse ci Ma-ke-te-paw tu kasitungus. i 1503 a mihcaan katukuh 1522 a mihcaanan, uyni tuse a liwliw patizeng tu cabeng, iza 9 ku panan nu tuse atu tulu ku pucekulan. Pay-low-s misulita lalangawan ci Bo-lan-si-s-ke. S-ke-li-na i Ye-mu 1522 a mihcaan hakya, itini patizang tu Tong-Ow likisian u saayaway a kitizaan miing-swa. kezeyÁ∂ďśŅü Wi-al-niw-s nu Li-taw-wan angangan a kezey, Pow-low a bayuay a kanatal u satabakiay anganngan a gingku. kanahatu uyni a tukay u tademaw iza 15% a tademaw nu Li-taw- wan, utni a tukay GDP, macalap ku Li-taw-wan tu 35%. 2005 a mihcaan, duduc tu picakay a aca miasip tu tademaw palalecad GDP pakala tu33,100 Amilika a kalisiw, macaliway ku Ow-mung a nipalalecad. 2004 a mihcaan Wi-al-niw-s nipaini tukanakay 460 a i'k Li-taw-wan "sakatusa tabakiay a tukay Kaw-na-s 150 i'k ku Li-taw-wan", macalap ku 37% nu micumuday tu sulu nu Li-taw-wan. imahini, Wi-al-niw-s makay kanatal a nipatahk tu kalisiw iza ku 3.6 i'k dada' ku nu Li-taw-wan, macalap ku nipasataan tu kalisiw tu 7.7%. hatiniay a demiad tabaki ku laed cen-bu situngusay tu cong-ya-cen-bu anikalalebu.
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s**** wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s "r~…ĺi-taw-wan a kamu *ir~…ĺnius, ( Ē~ °***r~…ĺ*n**s) , ajza r~…ĺi-taw-wan a kanatar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan a tukaj patiz…ôŇč tu r~…ĺi ¶…ô. tini i amis bar~…ĺat ** tu ** a b…ôn, war~…ĺi ¶in ** tu ** b…ôn. **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, tiniaj a tad…ômaw ***,*** "ńßamin u wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s a kuwan u tad…ômaw ***,***". mar~…ĺumajaj a nijazu Ē~ ° **** a mińß ¶aan par~…ĺa nu kitakitaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s u **** a mińß ¶aan nu ow- ¶ow a kańß…ônur~…ĺan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. r~…ĺikis** i r~…ĺikisiaj, wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s zajńßan nau kasa ¶in- ¶…ô atu kawa nu ńßitaj u r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan na ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a kanatar~…ĺ. wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s sa u kasumamadan a tus…ô nu r~…ĺikisi, migiŇčnkiwaj tu r~…ĺikisi "*omas bat*ra" asa nakamuan **** a mińß ¶aan min-taw- ¶ja-s pakar~…ĺańß…ôn tu mar~…ĺa r~…ĺi-taw-wan a ńßuŇčti a ¶i- ¶…ôn *oruta, ujza wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s. dudu ¶ tu ¶j…ô-s-wa-bu.mi-ow-s…ôn a kamu, "izaw ku mikuwanaj tu r~…ĺi-taw-wan, i zikuz nu piadupan i mar~…ĺikataj a r~…ĺamar~…ĺ abi Ē~ °, ¶is…ôpi tu par~…ĺiajaw. mańßur~…ĺak ku spnpi zikuz, nikabi Ē~ °an niza nasawni patiz…ôŇč tu tukaj Ē~ °." *omas bat*ra *oruta, ." ujni a tukaj saajawaj i nasur~…ĺita mapatańßkar~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶aan, u situŇčusaj k…ô-ti-mi-na-s i ajaw a mińß ¶aan patigami ¶i zow-waŇč ar~…ĺ-s…ô-ar~…ĺ s…ô mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ amidiput tu r~…ĺi-taw-wan a ¶aaj kaar~…ĺa ku tiw-tun-s sapaput, mańßukaj tu ńßawsa, **** a mińß ¶a i a bur~…ĺan ** a dimiad mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a pasajza i ńßan-sa a kar~…ĺakadum u aŇčaŇčan patigzamin tu tukajaj, pasai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu kakitaan, pasubajuaj, misiwbajaj, misamukinaj taza sir~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj atu mar~…ĺukaj kasasumaaj a tad…ômaw "t…ô-kow-atu ju-taj" tajni manan…ôr~…ĺ i r~…ĺi-taw-wan, ujza sa i wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-saj ńßajmaws satu mar~…ĺańßad tańßkar~…ĺ tu i pur~…ĺur~…ĺ nu ju-taj a kitizaan. **** a mińß ¶aan anu ¶aaj **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺi-tawan nu situŇčusaj ¶i ar~…ĺ- ¶i-ar~…ĺ-ta-si sumir~…ĺawaj a kaŇčaŇčajawan mad…ôm…ô ¶ ¶in- ¶aŇč-ńßan-kow zikuz, par~…ĺańßad tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °katukuńß i ¶i-pu-po-tow-r~…ĺi-ja atu-u-k…ô-r~…ĺan a ur~…ĺaur~…ĺaŇčan, namańßiza ujaan ¶i-pu-r~…ĺow-s nu ma ¶akataj-toŇč- ¶…ôn- ¶jaw, s-r~…ĺa-bu kiwkaj a kamu atu ur~…ĺi ¶ nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj pa ¶ubud…ôn tu i wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s, tiniaj pakutaj…ôn tu ¶i-pu, i pow-r~…ĺan mapur~…ĺuŇč tu pow-r~…ĺan ajaw mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku tinsikiw, ńßiza satu mar~…ĺa anu s-r~…ĺa-bu tuŇč- ¶…ôn a siŇčku ma ¶akataj a aŇčaŇčan. **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺi-taw-wan nu situŇčusaj kaj-r~…ĺa pab…ôr~…ĺi tu tiniaj a tus…ô ¶i ma-k…ô-t…ô-paw tu kasituŇčus. i **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aanan, ujni tus…ô a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw patiz…ôŇč tu ¶ab…ôŇč, iza * ku panan nu tus…ô atu tur~…ĺu ku pu ¶…ôkur~…ĺan. paj-r~…ĺow-s misur~…ĺita r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶i bo-r~…ĺan-si-s-k…ô. s-k…ô-r~…ĺi-na i j…ô-mu **** a mińß ¶aan ńßakja, itini patizaŇč tu toŇč-ow r~…ĺikisian u saajawaj a kitizaan miiŇč-swa. k…ôz…ô** wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s nu r~…ĺi-taw-wan aŇčaŇčan a k…ôz…ô, pow-r~…ĺow a bajuaj a kanatar~…ĺ u satabakiaj aŇčanŇčan a giŇčku. kanańßatu ujni a tukaj u tad…ômaw iza **% a tad…ômaw nu r~…ĺi-taw- wan, utni a tukaj gdp, ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku r~…ĺi-taw-wan tu **%. **** a mińß ¶aan, dudu ¶ tu pi ¶akaj a a ¶a miasip tu tad…ômaw par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad gdp pakar~…ĺa tu**,*** amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw, ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku ow-muŇč a nipar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. **** a mińß ¶aan wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s nipaini tukanakaj *** a i Ē~ °k r~…ĺi-taw-wan "sakatusa tabakiaj a tukaj kaw-na-s *** i Ē~ °k ku r~…ĺi-taw-wan", ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku **% nu mi ¶umudaj tu sur~…ĺu nu r~…ĺi-taw-wan. imańßini, wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s makaj kanatar~…ĺ a nipatańßk tu kar~…ĺisiw iza ku *.* i Ē~ °k dada Ē~ ° ku nu r~…ĺi-taw-wan, ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku nipasataan tu kar~…ĺisiw tu *.*%. ńßatiniaj a d…ômiad tabaki ku r~…ĺa…ôd ¶…ôn-bu situŇčusaj tu ¶oŇč-ja- ¶…ôn-bu anikar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu.
S.FORM: == kakaliman == Wi-al-niw-sÁ∂≠ÁąĺÁīźśĖĮ Wi-al-niw-s "Li-taw-wan a kamu Vilnius, ('v ≤…™l ≤n ≤ äs) , ayza Li-taw-wan a kanatal angangan a tukay patizeng tu lice. tini i amis balat 54 tu 41 a ben, wali cin 25 tu 17 ben. 2020 a mihcaan hawsa, tiniay a tademaw 580,020 "hamin u Wi-al-niw-s a kuwan u tademaw 810,290". malumayay a niyazu' 1994 a mihcaan pala nu kitakitay a nisubelidan a lalangawan. Wi-al-niw-s u 2009 a mihcaan nu Ow-cow a kahenulan a lalangawan. likisś≠∑ŚŹ≤ i likisiay, Wi-al-niw-s zayhan nau kasa cin-ce atu kawa nu hitay u lalekalan nacaay kalecaday a kanatal. Wi-al-niw-s sa u kasumamadan a tuse nu likisi, migingnkiway tu likisi "Romas BatŇęra" asa nakamuan 1253 a mihcaan Min-taw-cya-s pakalahen tu mala Li-taw-wan a hungti a ci-cen Voruta, uyza Wi-al-niw-s. duduc tu Cye-s-wa-bu.Mi-ow-sen a kamu, "izaw ku mikuwanay tu Li-taw-wan, i zikuz nu piadupan i malikatay a lamal abi', cisepi tu paliayaw. mahulak ku spnpi zikuz, nikabi'an niza nasawni patizeng tu tukay'." Romas BatŇęra Voruta, ." uyni a tukay saayaway i nasulita mapatahkal i 1323 a mihcaan, u situngusay Ke-ti-mi-na-s i ayaw a mihcaan patigami ci Zow-wang al-se-al se milunguc amidiput tu Li-taw-wan acaay kaala ku Tiw-tun-s sapaput, mahukay tu hawsa, 1325 a mihca I a bulan 25 a dimiad muliyaw aca pasayza i Han-sa a kalakadum u angangan patigzamin tu tukayay, pasaicelang tu kakitaan, pasubayuay, misiwbayay, misamukinay taza silala'ay atu malukay kasasumaay a tademaw "Te-kow-atu Yu-tay" tayni mananel i Li-taw-wan, uyza sa i Wi-al-niw-say haymaws satu malahad tahkal tu i pulul nu Yu-tay a kitizaan. 1362 a mihcaan anucaay 1363 a mihcaan Li-tawan nu situngusay ci Al-ci-al-ta-si sumilaway a kangangayawan mademec Cin-cang-han-kow zikuz, palahad tu lala'katukuh I Ci-pu-Po-tow-li-ya atu-U-ke-lan a ulaulangan, namahiza uyaan Ci-pu-low-s nu macakatay-Tong-cen-cyaw, S-la-bu kiwkay a kamu atu ulic nu laylay pacubuden tu i Wi-al-niw-s, tiniay pakutayen tu Ci-pu, i Pow-lan mapulung tu Pow-lan ayaw malilid ku tinsikiw, hiza satu mala anu S-la-bu Tung-cen a singku macakatay a angangan. 1378 a mihcaan Li-taw-wan nu situngusay Kay-la pabeli tu tiniay a tuse ci Ma-ke-te-paw tu kasitungus. i 1503 a mihcaan katukuh 1522 a mihcaanan, uyni tuse a liwliw patizeng tu cabeng, iza 9 ku panan nu tuse atu tulu ku pucekulan. Pay-low-s misulita lalangawan ci Bo-lan-si-s-ke. S-ke-li-na i Ye-mu 1522 a mihcaan hakya, itini patizang tu Tong-Ow likisian u saayaway a kitizaan miing-swa. kezeyÁ∂ďśŅü Wi-al-niw-s nu Li-taw-wan angangan a kezey, Pow-low a bayuay a kanatal u satabakiay anganngan a gingku. kanahatu uyni a tukay u tademaw iza 15% a tademaw nu Li-taw- wan, utni a tukay GDP, macalap ku Li-taw-wan tu 35%. 2005 a mihcaan, duduc tu picakay a aca miasip tu tademaw palalecad GDP pakala tu33,100 Amilika a kalisiw, macaliway ku Ow-mung a nipalalecad. 2004 a mihcaan Wi-al-niw-s nipaini tukanakay 460 a i'k Li-taw-wan "sakatusa tabakiay a tukay Kaw-na-s 150 i'k ku Li-taw-wan", macalap ku 37% nu micumuday tu sulu nu Li-taw-wan. imahini, Wi-al-niw-s makay kanatal a nipatahk tu kalisiw iza ku 3.6 i'k dada' ku nu Li-taw-wan, macalap ku nipasataan tu kalisiw tu 7.7%. hatiniay a demiad tabaki ku laed cen-bu situngusay tu cong-ya-cen-bu anikalalebu.

amis bar~…ĺat ** tu ** a b…ôn, war~…ĺi ¶in ** tu ** b…ôn. **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, tiniaj a tad…ômaw ***,*** "ńßamin u wi-ar~…ĺ-niw-s a kuwan u tad…ômaw ***,***". mar~…ĺumajaj a nijazu Ē~ ° **** a
